creator: gahr@FreeBSD.org
text:
Strange, I don't even see your main function in the stack trace. I guess there's something strange related to initialization. Try to compile your program with the same compiler you used to build wxgtk30. If you have multiple compilers installed maybe some dependent port was built with g++48 and some other with clang?

What does ldd /usr/local/lib/libwx_gtk2u_core-3.0.so say?
